summary: There was a statistically significant spike in adverse event reports for amoxicillin on 2022-03-02, with 54 reports received compared to an expected 29.07 based on a Holt-Winters forecast.
notable_pattern: Reports from this time period often involved multiple medications, including amoxicillin, and were frequently associated with hospitalization.
confidence_caveat: This signal is based on a limited sample of 8 reports and should be further investigated before any conclusions can be drawn.
